Regions.Description: In the right side of the bedroom, on a commode there was a casetophone. Straight ahead, a bed and a painting above it, on the wall
Regions.name: bedroom

Regions.Description: In the right side of the bedroom there was a desk, with a laptop on it. Straight ahead - a library shelf. The bed was on the left side. On top of the bed, on the wall there was a painting hanging
Regions.name: bedroom_debug

Regions.Description: The living room was spacious, with three large sofas and a tea table in the center. On the floor there was a plant and two candles. There were paintings on the walls and some photos placed on a commode
Regions.name: living room

Regions.Description: In the center of the kitchen was a table. The kitchen had two paintings hanging on the wall, many closets and a sink
Regions.name: kitchen
